MINI MINUTES:

Jason R. Lindsay, Esq. of Greenberg Traurig, Tel. 310.586.3861, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, LLC'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
